name: anti-hall
description: Verify-first discipline for Codex. Bundles Codex-native skills plus an installer for the Codex hook subset that can be enforced today: session/prompt nudges, shell-command guards, Stop guards, graphify reminders, task discipline, and speculation checks. Claude Code plugin files are kept separate and unchanged.

interface.shortDescription: Verify-first guardrails and workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Anti-Hall brings verify-first discipline, command/git guards, task reminders, graphify-first nudges, and Codex-native workflow guidance to Codex. Some Claude edit-time and subagent lifecycle hooks have no direct Codex equivalent; those are exposed as skill/workflow protocols instead of pretending to hard-block.
defaultPrompt: Use anti-hall to verify this change before claiming it is done
